title: Uber cuts 10% of customer-service jobs and, for the first time, blames AI
summary: It is also the second round of cuts in under two months. “Our organisation has become too complex and siloed,” Megha Yethadka, Uber’s vice-president of global community operations, wrote in an internal memo.
